title: Chapter 31
content:
Chapter 31: Chapter 31: Meeting The Twins Again

Both of them immediately looked at who was touching them and realized it was Damon. Mio and Mia’s faces went red instantly.

Damon can feel a pull on his arms. They plan to run away as he expected, but he kept them in his arms.

"Where are you two going?"

"W-we are g-go—" Mia tried to answer, but she couldn’t even form a proper word. Then Mio answered instead as she had already regained her composure.

"We plan to do a mission," Mio said with a calm voice, but her blushing face betrayed her.

"Hmm... Have you decided which one?" Damon asks as if nothing had happened between them.

"N-not yet..." Mia finally spoke, but her voice was even smaller than usual.

"I see, then I will go look for my mission," he said nonchalantly, dumbfounding them.

’Looks like he doesn’t know about us peeking at him, so we should act normally.’ a thought appears inside the girls mind.

The twins looked at each other and nodded and approached Damon again.

"Junior brother, are you going on a hunting mission?" they asked Damon as he stood in the hunting section.

"Yes, I plan to go out and gather experience," he said calmly.

"Then, since it’s your first, how about you go with us?" Mio suggests him.

"With you two?"

"Yes, we are a core disciple, so we can pick a more difficult mission than an outer disciple. We can hunt Earth Spirit Realm beasts, with your sword qi and sword intent, it should be more challenging than the mission for the outer disciple hunting mission with only the Elementary Spirit Realm." Mio explained it to Damon.

"Y-yes, and we can help you if anything happens," Mia said while nodding in agreement with her sister.

"Sword Intent, huh... so the news already spread..."

"Not really, only a few elders and a few core disciples know it, since most of the disciples don’t know what sword intent is."

"I see, then I will go with senior sister."

"Yay, alright." Mia jumped excitedly.

"Then let me pick the mission."

"Sure, go ahead."

Damon casually walked up to a random mission at the hunting section and tore it off the wall without even looking at it.

He then walked to the front desk to get his mission recorded by a sect elder.

Looking at Damon already picked the mission and walks toward the desk, Mio and Mia follow him.

****

On the desk, Mia gave the paper to the elder.

"Hm? Hunting Flame Tiger by the Fire Valley?" When the elder in charge of recording missions saw the mission Damon picked, he looked at him with a surprised expression.

"You want to accept this? Flame Tigers are usually around the Earth Spirit Realm, while you still only an outer disciple, there’s no way I’ll allow this. Not to mention the dangerous environment at the Fire Valley..."

"Don’t worry about that, Elder, we are going together with him," said Mio, who appeared together with Mia behind Damon.

"Ahh... You both are core disciples." The elder looked at them in surprise.

"Yes, Elder, we are the ones who plan to take that mission. We just asked our junior brother to join us for the experience, since he just joined recently. He is also a golden token holder."

Mio’s clear voice managed to convince the elder.

The elder silently looked at him for another moment before nodding.

"Very well. since you are just following them. Do not push yourself if you are in danger, let your senior sister take care of it. We cannot afford to lose a promising disciple such as yourself!"

"Your name?" The elder then asked him.

"Damon Arcknight."

"And you two?" The elder then asked them.

"Mio Nightrider and Mia Nightrider."

"Damon Arcknight?" The elder had a feeling that he had heard of the name before, but he wasn’t able to remember where or when he had heard it from. "There, you guys are good to go." He said after writing their name in the logbook.

"Thank you." They all bowed to him before walking out of the Mission Hall.

****

After they left the Mission Hall, they immediately went to the sect’s front gate, that will lead them to the outside world.

While walking toward the gate, Damon asks the twin.

"By the way, senior sister, where are we going?" Damon asks nonchalantly.

"What?! You pick the mission, but don’t know where they are?" Mio shock hearing Damon’s question.

"Yep, I just take the mission randomly."

"Haah... We are going to Crimson Moon City. It’s the nearest city to Fire Valley." Mio explained it to him.

"How long is it going to take to get there?" Damon asked again, but this time Mia finally spoke.

"Junior brother, do you want to just do the mission or enjoy the journey?" Mia asks Damon.

"What’s the difference? Between just doing the mission or enjoying the journey."

"If we are going to enjoy the journey, we are going to walk to Azure Cloud City and use a carriage, it will take two days to reach Crimson Moon City. If you want, just be quick and do the mission. We can use our flying ship and arrive at Crimson Moon City in a few hours." Mia tells Damon the options.

"Obviously, we’re going to enjoy the journey. I went out with two beautiful girls, why would I want to go quickly?" He sent a perverted grin toward the twins."

Seeing his grin, both of the blush and smile at the same time, they were happy to be called beautiful by Damon, but at the same time, they began to remember the scene of him having sex.

While the twins were daydreaming about Damon, they all arrived at the sect’s front gate.

"Halt! Where do you think you are going, disciples?"

The guards standing by the entrance gate stopped Damon and the twins when they noticed they were approaching.

"We have business at the Fire Valley." Mio showed them the mission they received from the Mission Hall.

The guards examined the stamp on the mission paper and confirmed the authenticity of the stamp.

"Very well. Be safe out there."

They opened the gate, then Damon, Mio, and Mia walked out. Soon disappearing from the sight of the guards.
